title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: self-hosted LLM runner with a simple CLI and REST API for macOS, Linux, and Windows.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, published on PyPI as 'ollama'.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, published on npm as 'ollama'.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) adding Ollama chat and embedding models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial Rust CLI for Ollama with interactive chat and model listing.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team, exposing Ollama models as Haystack generators.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Community n8n node to call Ollama models inside automation workflows.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module for CI pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers and run prompts.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot template that combines Ollama with Chroma vector DB for private RAG.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds Ollama-powered summarization and Q&A commands.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Raycast extension to query Ollama models and insert results into Logseq journals.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and CLI for Ollama, available on NuGet as OllamaSharp.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Unofficial Elixir wrapper for Ollama, published on Hex as ollama_ex.
